name: io.github.seldonframe/mcp
description: Open-source GoHighLevel alternative for agencies. White-label CRM, booking, intake, chatbot via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: SELDONFRAME_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Bearer API key for hosted SeldonFrame workspaces beyond the first one. The first workspace is free and the MCP mints a device token automatically. Set this to unlock additional workspaces, custom domains, and full Brain v2.

environmentVariables.name: SELDONFRAME_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the SeldonFrame API base URL. Defaults to https://app.seldonframe.com. Set for self-hosted deployments.
